hooks.command: in=$(cat); s=$(printf '%s' "$in" | sed -E 's~127\.0\.0\.1~LOCALIP~g; s~0\.0\.0\.0~LOCALIP~g; s~https?://localhost~LOCAL~gI'); if printf '%s' "$s" | grep -qiE 'curl|wget|invoke-restmethod|invoke-webrequest|start-bitstransfer|downloadstring|downloadfile|\biwr\b|\birm\b' && printf '%s' "$s" | grep -qE 'https?://|([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: direct HTTP to external hosts from the dev machine trips endpoint security. Verify from inside the VM (gcloud ssh -> curl localhost:3000) or leave the check to the browser."}}'; fi
